synopsis: Fate of the Jedi: Vortex by Troy Denning is the sixth novel in the Fate of the Jedi series and was released on November 30, 2010. At the end of the book, it has an introduction to Fate of the Jedi: Conviction. The audio version is narrated by Marc Thompson. The paperback was released on March 27, 2012.
title: Vortex
